title: GEP Personality Report Generation
entry_point: main() — top-level IIFE wrapped in try/catch
activity_flow: Filter events: keep only type === 'EvolutionEvent' → evs[]
Skip if not EvolutionEvent or no personality_state
Upsert map entry: accumulate success/fail counts, rolling avg_score (online mean)
scoreFromCounts: Laplace-smoothed success rate (75%) + sample-weighted avg_score (25%)
Merge statRows + evRows by key (events take precedence for counts/avg_score)
Print ranked row (rank, total, succ, fail, succ_rate, avg, score, key)
key_functions: main() — orchestrates all steps, writes to stdout
readJsonIfExists(p, fallback) — safe JSON file read, returns fallback on missing/error
readJsonlIfExists(p, limitLines=5000) — reads JSONL, slices to last N lines, parses each
aggregateFromEvents(events) — groups EvolutionEvents by personality key, accumulates counts + online mean
scoreFromCounts(success, fail, avgScore) — Laplace-smoothed composite score
personalityKey(ps) — imported from gep/personality; produces string key
pad(s, n) — left-pads string to fixed column width
data_sources: memory/personality_state.json — current personality + historical stats (model.current, model.stats)
gep_assets/events.jsonl — raw EvolutionEvent log (last 10,000 lines used)
key_decisions: model.current present → normalize vs default personality state
merged.length === 0 → early exit with 'no stats' message
r.source === 'events' → events override model stats for counts/avg_score during merge
mutation category in [repair, optimize, innovate] and count > 0 → include in breakdown
output: stdout — plain-text report with: paths, current personality JSON, ranked personality stats table (top 25), notes
error_handling: Top-level try/catch: writes error to stderr, exits with code 1
score_formula: score = p*0.75 + q*0.25*sampleWeight  where p=Laplace(success,fail), q=clamp01(avgScore), sampleWeight=min(1, total/8)
